body.p1: Use the HOBC custodial web wallet for convenient deposits and withdrawals, or install the official Windows standalone wallet from the downloads page when you want local key control.
body.p2: Deposit addresses are generated by the custodial wallet backend. Deposit status must come from real chain confirmations only.
body.p3: Withdrawals must show real status and real txids only after broadcast. No fake balances or fake txids are allowed.
hero.title: Public Wallet Disabled
meta.description: HOBC custodial web wallet, Windows standalone wallet links, and wallet risk notices.
meta.title: Wallet
